title: Vanisher Studios
description: This is a superhero mod that gives you very cool abilitites in minecraft.
body:
🌀 Mod Name: VanisherStudio – Powers & Progression
Description:
VanisherStudio introduces an original power-based progression system to Minecraft, blending elemental manipulation, unique abilities, and custom GUI features into a survival or RPG-style gameplay loop.

⚔️ Core Features:
Unique Power Sets
Unlock and master a variety of powers such as:

🏜️ Siltbind – Sand-based combat with defensive tools and flight

🧲 Magnet Manipulation – Control metal and magnetic forces to attack or defend

⌛ Timebound Veil – Temporal abilities that control time and movement
etc.
Custom Skill Trees
Visually navigate and unlock up to 5 abilities per power with a vertical, GUI-based skill tree. Each ability varies in combat, support, or passive function.

Ability Wheel System
A GUI-based selector allowing players to choose active powers dynamically without needing to manage inventory items.

Cooldown Systems
Every ability includes cooldown logic to prevent spam and balance gameplay, ensuring fair PvP and PvE use.

Custom Icons & GUIs
Handcrafted Minecraft-style pixel art for every ability, status icon, and menu item to fully immerse players in the mod's aesthetic.

🧠 How It Affects Gameplay:
Adds RPG-style progression and character builds

Encourages strategic combat via cooldowns, passives, and ultimate abilities

Promotes exploration and base setup using recall teleportation

Balances survival mechanics with power fantasy elements
